title: Razorpay is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Razorpay is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
